test_definition.test_family: axis-level local-campaign versus public-growth mean-distance contrasts
test_definition.null_model: group labels are exchangeable within each predeclared perturbation axis for the selected metric
test_definition.p_value_floor: 1/resamples when no permutation draw matches or exceeds the observed statistic

predeclared_contrasts.rationale: Shared perturbation axis already present in the fixed v1.2 correction family.

deferred_contrasts.reason: Holdout transform labels do not map one-to-one onto the six public-growth axes. Treat holdout evidence as source-separation and robustness context until an axis mapping is predeclared.

The baseline uses character n-gram cosine distance rather than the CogniPrint profile vector. Use it for bridge interpretation, not as a direct permutation contrast unless a separate baseline-specific test family is frozen.

reporting_rules: Report all predeclared contrasts, including null or weak results.
Report p-values alongside effect sizes and group sizes.
Apply both Holm-Bonferroni and Benjamini-Hochberg corrections across the six-axis family.
Use finite-resample p-value floors when no permutation draw exceeds the observed statistic.
Do not promote unstable, underpowered, or small-sample results as robust.
Do not use this spec to claim author identification, text provenance determination, legal conclusion, deterministic classification, or universal performance.
